name: Holiday Sweet Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Sweet Potatoes (peeled and diced into 1-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Add shallots, onion, and celery; cook for about 6 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the chicken stock, nutmeg, and sweet potatoes. Bring to a boil.
4. Lower the heat and simmer for about 30 minutes until the potatoes are tender.
5. Transfer the mixture to a food processor or blender and blend until smooth.
6. Return the blended mixture to the saucepan.
7. Stir in the half-and-half and sherry, then season with white pepper.
8. Continue heating gently without bringing to a full boil.
9. Serve hot and sprinkle chopped walnuts on each bowl before serving. Serves about 6 people.
